untranslatable_reason: Box spread arbitrage requires multi-leg options pricing (bid-ask spreads on vertical spreads at two different strikes). The allowed indicators are equity price/technical indicators only. This strategy requires: (1) real-time box spread cost calculation across call and put verticals, (2) strike price differential monitoring, and (3) interest rate component on credit spreads. None of these can be expressed using the provided technical indicators. The signal is fundamentally an options pricing arbitrage that cannot be translated to single-leg price/technical conditions.
translation_notes: This is a volatility-free arbitrage strategy dependent on derivative pricing models, not price action. Requires dedicated options pricing engine with access to bid-ask spreads, implied volatility surfaces, and cost-of-carry calculations.
